name: Voloferniges, the Darkest Dragon Doomrider
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>熔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ヴォルニゲシュ
name_jp_tl: Volnigesh, the Black Lava Dragon Rider
desc:
2 Level 7 monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 2 materials from this card, then target 1 face-up card on the field; destroy it, and if you destroyed a monster, you can make 1 face-up monster you control gain ATK equal to the destroyed monster's original Level/Rank x 300 until the end of the next turn. This card cannot attack the turn you activate this effect. This is a Quick Effect if this card has a Dragon monster as material, but cannot be activated in the Damage Step.

action: Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
Applies effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
misc: Can be activated during either player's turn
